title: BEM-859 execute after OIDC verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 15:33 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem858_verify_claude_oidc_fix_and_triad.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','missing_bem858_state')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present_after_oidc_fix':
    status='triad_present_process_protocol_next'
    next_action='process real Claude response and update agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='workflow_yaml_still_suspicious':
    status='yaml_patch_required_next'
    next_action='patch claude dispatcher yaml permissions/env and rerun smoke'
else:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem859_claude_dispatch_after_oidc_fix.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-859 automatic Claude dispatcher run after OIDC/YAML fix verification','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_dispatch_queued_after_oidc_fix'
    next_action='fresh Codex tick then verify dispatch result, runtime state, and real Claude response'
state={'bem':'BEM-859','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem859_execute_after_oidc_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem859_execute_after_oidc_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-859 | Execute After OIDC Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem859_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-859'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem859_execute_after_oidc_verify.json','governance/reports/bem859_execute_after_oidc_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem859_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed route after BEM-858 OIDC verification: queued Claude dispatcher if triad not present, or selected protocol/YAML path')
